measurement_note: Size is P, the number of directed pairs. Each input is a single directed chain listed in reverse order, so the valid arrangement runs from 0 through P. Hierholzer's algorithm consumes every edge once. A correct implementation that repeatedly scans the full unused-pair list for the next matching start completes all tiers and fails only by quadratic scaling.
